programme.title: Airtime Ep40: Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surfing Championships - Oregon Coast
programme.desc: Nelscott Reef lies just off the coast of Oregon and is home to a cold, savage wave that only appears 1-2 times per year, but when the conditions are right this awe inspiring wave can reach heights of up to 50-feet. The Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surf Championships involve the world’s best big-wave tow-in surfers including World Champion Garrett MacNamara and XXL champion Brad Gerlach who, along with 20 other world-class surfers, attempt to tame this monster of the sea.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with challenges, adventure and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before season 2 arrives, we have a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants will face off against 3 special operations veterans in a 48-hour no-sleep battle of endurance and willpower. Starting with a kayak, portage and run challenge, it’s time to discover if these top contestants are worthy of the name All-Stars.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: If you like guns, this is the one you’ve been waiting for. New state-of-the-art weapons and gear, including some even Don has never seen. See if the 32 have what it takes to survive gun challenges from the Mann himself. The best shot may surprise you!

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the two teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to chopping down trees with only a small ax, it’s a battle for points that’ll take immense willpower to see to the end.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: In the Season 2 premiere of Surviving Mann you'll meet The Black Team and The Blue Team—12 tough-as-nails contestants who will take on everything Don could throw at them even after seeing Season 1! Co-host Sheriff Mark Lamb jumps in to bring advanced law enforcement training tactics & strategies to the evolution line-up.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: T-minus one day to the mission, and the All-Stars are feeling the pressure. With a warm-up course of fire under their belts, the team levels up to some serious firepower—thanks to the experts at Capitol Armory. Just when they think the day can’t get any more intense, Don sends them sky-high for a one-of-a-kind shooting challenge aboard the Capitol Armory chopper. Once back on solid ground, the All-Stars dive into critical training scenarios designed to make or break their mission success. With time ticking down and expectations mounting, the team must dig deep, trust their instincts, and come together like never before.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach presented by Bonsoy 2025
programme.desc: Bells Beach on Victoria's South Coast is the longest-running surfing competition and will host the 62st edition this year. Bells is Australian surfing heritage. With the hope of scoring long-period, groomed walls, the surfers will need to display the perfect combination of power, precision, and timing. The biggest surfing legends have had the honor of winning and ringing ‘The Bell' and 2025 will see a hungry new generation vying for the opportunity to cement their names in one of surfing's most prestigious events.

programme.title: What's in the Barn
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. Outflanked once when the bike was spotted and sold to a private collector in 1995, Dale has vowed to locate the machine and make Wheels Through Time its final resting place.
